text.title: Agile and Hybrid Approaches Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Agile and Hybrid Approaches artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: factor_scores missing 4 of 5 factors; scores not wrapped in object with evidence; recommendation missing rationale; no decision_owner; no phases.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
